name: JoAi: Generate Element Variation

description.en: Generate a new variation of an existing element using AI, optionally guided by custom instructions.
description.de: Generiere mithilfe von KI eine neue Variation eines bestehenden Elements, optional gesteuert durch individuelle Anweisungen.
description.es: Generate a new variation of an existing element using AI, optionally guided by custom instructions.
description.fr: Generate a new variation of an existing element using AI, optionally guided by custom instructions.
description.ro: Generate a new variation of an existing element using AI, optionally guided by custom instructions.
description.it: Generate a new variation of an existing element using AI, optionally guided by custom instructions.

bot: Use this when the user wants an alternative version of an existing element. If the user refers to an element by name, list elements first to find the matching ID.

inputs.name: Element ID

description.en: The ID of the element to vary
description.de: Die ID des Elements, von dem eine Variation erstellt werden soll
description.es: The ID of the element to vary
description.fr: The ID of the element to vary
description.ro: The ID of the element to vary
description.it: The ID of the element to vary

inputs.bot: The element hash ID. If the user refers to an element by name, list elements first to find the matching ID.

inputs.name: Prompt

description.en: Optional instructions for generating the variation
description.de: Optionale Anweisungen zur Generierung der Variation
description.es: Optional instructions for generating the variation
description.fr: Optional instructions for generating the variation
description.ro: Optional instructions for generating the variation
description.it: Optional instructions for generating the variation

inputs.bot: Optional guidance for how the variation should differ — e.g., 'make it more formal', 'shorter version', 'different tone'.
